EnterpriseSDK
Table of Contents

Interface IGeometryCollection

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geometry
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geometry.dll

Provides access to members that can be used for accessing, adding and removing individual geometries of a multi-part geometry (Multipoint, Polyline, Polygon, MultiPatch, and GeometryBag).

[Guid("C801565E-99CA-11D0-82F7-0000F8034032")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IGeometryCollection

Properties

Geometry[int]

A reference to the ith geometry.

IGeometry Geometry[int Index] { get; }

Parameters

Index int

Property Value

IGeometry

Examples

Sample Snippet

GeometryCount

The number of geometries in this collection.

int GeometryCount { get; }

Property Value

int

Examples

Sample Snippet

Methods

AddGeometries(int, ref IGeometry)

Adds references to the specified geometries. This method is intended for internal use only.

void AddGeometries(int Count, ref IGeometry newGeometries)

Parameters

Count int
newGeometries IGeometry

Examples

Sample Snippet

AddGeometry(IGeometry, ref object, ref object) 

void AddGeometry(IGeometry inGeometry, ref object before, ref object after)

Parameters

inGeometry IGeometry
before object
after object

AddGeometryCollection(IGeometryCollection) 

void AddGeometryCollection(IGeometryCollection newGeometries)

Parameters

newGeometries IGeometryCollection

GeometriesChanged()

Tells this geometry collection that some of its geometries have been altered. Use this method on polylines, polygons and multipatches after directly editing one of its parts.

void GeometriesChanged()

Examples

Sample Snippet

InsertGeometries(int, int, ref IGeometry)

Inserts at the specified index references to some number of geometries in the input array. This method is intended for internal use only.

void InsertGeometries(int Index, int Count, ref IGeometry newGeometries)

Parameters

Index int
Count int
newGeometries IGeometry

Examples

Sample Snippet

InsertGeometryCollection(int, IGeometryCollection) 

void InsertGeometryCollection(int Index, IGeometryCollection newGeometries)

Parameters

Index int
newGeometries IGeometryCollection

QueryGeometries(int, int, out IGeometry)

Populates the array with references to a sub-sequence of geometries. This method is intended for internal use only.

void QueryGeometries(int Index, int Count, out IGeometry geometries)

Parameters

Index int
Count int
geometries IGeometry

Examples

Sample Snippet

RemoveGeometries(int, int)

Removes references to some geometries from this collection.

void RemoveGeometries(int Index, int Count)

Parameters

Index int
Count int

Examples

Sample Snippet

SetGeometries(int, ref IGeometry)

Replaces all geometries in the collection with the specified number of references to those in the input array. This method is intended for internal use only.

void SetGeometries(int Count, ref IGeometry newGeometries)

Parameters

Count int
newGeometries IGeometry

Examples

Sample Snippet

SetGeometryCollection(IGeometryCollection) 

void SetGeometryCollection(IGeometryCollection newParts)

Parameters

newParts IGeometryCollection
